arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs Girona 2025 live stream: Time, TV channels and how to watch La Liga online
arts.sum: Real Madrid host Girona in the return of La Liga to the Estadio Santiago Bernabeu. Venue : Santiago Bernabeu, Madrid, Spain.

arts.ttl: Why Jude Bellingham Isn't Playing for Real Madrid vs. Girona
arts.sum: Real Madrid's Jude Bellingham is unavailable to play against Girona after receiving a red card last weekend in La Liga.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid star needed 'injection and needles' to face Man City
arts.sum: The grit and determination of Real Madrid's Federico Valverde was evidenced during the Champions League clash with Manchester City.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs Girona, 2025 La Liga: Predicted lineups
arts.sum: Real Madrid predicted XI: Courtois, Vazquez, Rudiger, Asencio, Fran Garcia, Camavinga, Modric, Brahim, Vinicius, Rodrygo, Mbappe. Real Madrid host Girona needing to score the three points after Atletico and Barcelona’s wins this weekend.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid announce squad for La Liga match against Girona
arts.sum: Real Madrid have published their squad list for today’s match against Girona in La Liga. Reports in Spain indicate that Ancelotti will give Valverde the chance to rest in this one as Vazquez returns to the starting lineup.

arts.ttl: The Data Shows that Raúl Asencio is Absolutely Ready for the National Team
arts.sum: Yet, as football evolves and data-driven analysis becomes more integral to decision-making, Raul Asencio emerges as a player whose performances unequivocally warrant a place in Spain’s squad. Using comprehensive metrics from Stathead, up to the most recent LaLiga round, we evaluated six Spanish centre-backs—Raul Asencio (R), Pau Cubarsí (C), Iñigo Martínez (I), Dani Vivian (V), Robin Le Normand (L), and Aitor Paredes (P)—across key defensive and build-up attributes.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid predicted lineup vs Girona
arts.sum: Real Madrid continue the defence of their La Liga crown on Sunday afternoon when they welcome Girona to the Santiago Bernabeu. Despite dumping Manchester City out of the Champions League midweek, things are not perfect for Madrid.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs Girona: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Previewing Real Madrid vs Girona in La Liga on Sunday, including team news, predictions and how to watch on TV.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid Predicted Lineup vs. Girona: La Liga
arts.sum: Real Madrid return to La Liga action against Girona without the suspended Jude Bellingham.

arts.ttl: Ancelotti: “La Liga is really tight and every game could be crucial"
arts.sum: Carlo Ancelotti spoke to the media on the eve of the team's LaLiga matchday 25 fixture against Girona, set to be played at the Santiago Bernabéu (Sunday, 4:15 pm CET): “This game comes at a hugely important moment in the season. If you play well and show a good attitude, the results will reward you in the end.”
